Car Detailing Lexington SC: Services, Prices & Lake Murray Area Guide (2026)

By Mikah Albertson — updated 2026-03-20

Car Detailing in Lexington SC — Your 2026 Options

Looking for car detailing in Lexington SC? Residents and businesses across Lexington County have two main choices: drop-off shop detailing or mobile detailing that comes directly to you. Mobile detailing has become the preferred option for most Lexington drivers because it saves the hassle of dropping off a vehicle, waiting hours, and arranging a ride back.

Our mobile detailing service brings a fully equipped setup to your driveway, office parking lot, or anywhere else in the Lexington SC area. We carry our own water supply and power, so all we need is a parking spot. Whether you want a basic interior refresh before a road trip or a full paint correction with ceramic coating, we handle it on-site.

Services available for Lexington SC customers include:

  • Interior detailing — vacuum, steam clean, leather conditioning, odor elimination
  • Exterior detailing — hand wash, decontamination, clay bar, wax or sealant
  • Full detail packages combining interior and exterior
  • Paint correction for swirl marks, oxidation, and light scratches
  • Ceramic coating for long-term paint protection
  • Boat-tow vehicle and truck-bed cleaning

Lexington SC Car Detailing Prices

Our pricing is transparent and consistent. The table below covers our two main packages. Ceramic coating and paint correction are quoted after a condition assessment because the labor involved varies significantly between vehicles.

Package What's Included Starting Price
Basic Detail Exterior hand wash, wheels and tires, interior vacuum, wipe-down, windows $225
Factory Reset Full interior steam clean and condition, full exterior wash, clay bar, wax, wheels, windows, door jambs $400
Ceramic Coating Full exterior decontamination, paint correction prep, professional-grade ceramic coating application Quote
Paint Correction Machine polish to remove swirl marks, water spots, light scratches, and oxidation Quote

Vehicle size, condition, and selected add-ons affect final pricing. Trucks, large SUVs, and vans carry a size surcharge. Vehicles with heavy pet hair, mold, or extreme soiling may require additional time. Call (803) 667-8731 or book online to get an accurate quote before we arrive.

Why Lake Murray Area Cars Need Extra Care

Lexington SC sits right alongside Lake Murray, one of the largest man-made lakes in the eastern United States. That proximity creates specific challenges for vehicle paint and interiors that Lexington drivers know well.

Humidity and moisture. The air near Lake Murray carries elevated moisture year-round. This accelerates mildew growth in car interiors, especially under floor mats and in trunk liners. Regular deep cleaning prevents musty odors and fabric damage.

Hard water mineral deposits. Lake Murray water has a higher mineral content than tap water. Boats that splash, weekend washing near the water, and general lake-area humidity leave white mineral deposits on paint that ordinary washing cannot remove. Our clay bar and decontamination process strips these deposits before they etch into clear coat.

Pollen. Spring in Lexington County brings some of the highest pollen counts in South Carolina. Yellow-green pine and oak pollen is mildly acidic. Left on paint for days, it can begin to etch the surface — especially when it combines with morning dew. Frequent exterior washes and a protective coating dramatically reduce the risk.

Boat-towing wear. Many Lexington households keep a boat on Lake Murray. Trucks and SUVs used for towing accumulate grime around the hitch, trailer brake dust on the rear bumper, and road debris in the wheel wells that standard carwashes skip entirely. Our detailing process addresses those areas specifically.

South Carolina sun damage. Lexington sits inland with minimal coastal breeze to moderate temperatures. Summer UV intensity fades interiors and oxidizes paint faster than in cooler climates. A ceramic coating provides UV protection that extends the life of your paint by years.

Our Lexington SC Car Detailing Process

Here is exactly what happens from booking to the final walk-around at your Lexington location:

  1. Book your appointment. Call (803) 667-8731 or use our online booking. Tell us your vehicle type, your location in Lexington SC, and which package you need. We confirm a time window that works for you.
  2. We arrive with everything. Our mobile unit carries its own water, power, professional-grade chemicals, steam equipment, machine polishers, and vacuums. We need only a parking spot — nothing else from you.
  3. Pre-wash and decontamination. We pre-rinse and apply a foam pre-wash to loosen surface contamination before touching the paint. On full detail packages we follow with an iron decontamination spray to remove brake dust and a clay bar to strip bonded contaminants.
  4. Exterior detailing. Two-bucket hand wash method, wheel and wheel well cleaning, tire dressing, door jamb wipe-down, glass treatment inside and out, and wax or sealant application.
  5. Interior detailing. Complete vacuum of seats, carpets, and trunk. Steam cleaning of hard surfaces, vents, and crevices. Leather or fabric conditioning. Window cleaning from inside. Odor treatment when needed.
  6. Final inspection. We walk around the vehicle with you before we pack up. If anything is not right, we address it on the spot. We do not leave until you are satisfied.

Lexington Areas We Service

Our Lexington SC mobile detailing coverage includes the following neighborhoods and communities:

  • Lake Murray Shores — Waterfront and lake-view properties where boats and outdoor vehicles see the most humidity and UV exposure.
  • Sunset Blvd corridor — The main commercial and residential strip through central Lexington, including townhomes and newer subdivisions.
  • Reserve at Midway — Established residential area popular with families; we regularly service multi-vehicle households here.
  • Governor's Grant — One of Lexington's largest planned communities. We service residents throughout the subdivision without requiring any extra trip fees.
  • Gilbert — Rural routes and agricultural areas just southwest of Lexington. Vehicles here often carry red clay and road dust that requires thorough decontamination.
  • Red Bank — Growing suburban area near the Lexington and Richland county line. Convenient for customers who commute into Columbia daily.
  • Oak Grove — Dense residential community with quick access to I-26. Popular for quick same-day appointments.
  • Pelion — Outlying community south of Lexington. We service Pelion with standard pricing and no additional travel fee.

If your community is not listed, call us. We service all of Lexington County and many surrounding areas. Our standard service radius keeps most Lexington locations within our regular coverage zone.

Ready to schedule? Call (803) 667-8731 or book online. We typically offer next-day appointments for most Lexington SC locations, with same-day availability on select dates.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does car detailing cost in Lexington SC?

Car detailing in Lexington SC starts at $225 for our Basic Detail package. Our Factory Reset full detail is $400. Ceramic coating and paint correction are quoted individually based on vehicle size and condition. Contact us at (803) 667-8731 for a free quote.

Do you offer mobile car detailing in Lexington SC?

Yes! We bring fully equipped mobile detailing service directly to your home or workplace throughout Lexington SC, including Lake Murray Shores, Governor's Grant, Sunset Blvd, Gilbert, Red Bank, Oak Grove, and surrounding areas. No shop visit needed.

Why do cars near Lake Murray need more frequent detailing?

Vehicles near Lake Murray are exposed to elevated humidity, hard water mineral deposits from lake spray, heavy pollen in spring, and increased UV intensity from water reflection. We recommend detailing every 3 months for Lake Murray area vehicles to prevent paint etching, water spots, and interior mildew.

How long does a car detail take in Lexington SC?

Our Basic Detail takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours. The Factory Reset full detail runs 4 to 5 hours depending on vehicle size and condition. Paint correction and ceramic coating appointments are scheduled separately and can take a full day. We work at your location so there is no waiting at a shop.

Do you detail boats and boat tow vehicles in Lexington SC?

Yes. Trucks and SUVs used for towing boats around Lake Murray accumulate trailer hitch grime, road salt residue, and undercarriage buildup that standard detailing often misses. We address these wear points directly and can also arrange marine detailing for boats docked in the area.
